industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Aksa Enerji Uretim A.S.
summary: Aksa Enerji √É¬úretim A.S., an independent power producer, produces and sells electricity in Turkey and Africa. The company produces energy from coal, fuel oil, biogas, natural gas, wind, and hydroelectricity. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 7 power plants with a total installed capacity of 1,946 MW. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Aksa Enerji √É¬úretim A.S. is a subsidiary of Kazanci Holding A.S.
